# awesome-ai-api (full dump for LLMs)

> Full, machine-readable leaderboard of AI API gateways, formatted for LLM ingestion.
> Snapshot: 2026-05-06 13:29 SGT. Total: 203. API-confirmed: 99.
> Canonical site: https://mackding.github.io/awesome-ai-api/
> Source repo: https://github.com/MackDing/awesome-ai-api
> License: MIT (code) + CC0 (data)

## Top 50 Gateways (sorted by score)

1. Avian — https://avian.io — score 9.9, API verified, region global, engine unknown, latency 110ms, uptime 100.0% over 14 samples, models: claude, gpt, anthropic, openai, deepseek, llama
2. ePhone AI — https://api.ephone.ai — score 9.9, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 235ms, uptime 100.0% over 14 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, openai, deepseek
